productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Multi Coloured Top
description: CompositionPink, cream and black striped knit top made of 100% cotton with dolman sleeves, round neck and has a ribbed hem FitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryTake feminine dressing to the next level with this knit top from united colors of benetton.
